articles.title: Binance denies using customers’ UNI for its own Uniswap votes
articles.description: Binance activated a vote function using customers’ UNI tokens. This Binance UNI delegation would have been Uniswap’s second-largest voter.

articles.title: Algorand is now on Cardano? Decoding the true picture
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the co-founder of IOHK (Input Output Hong Kong), tweeted that Algorand was now on Cardano in a rather dramatic manner. Hoskinson responded to a tweet announcing that Milkomeda, a layer 2 protocol, was now live on Algorand.
